refentry.refsect1: &reftitle.returnvalues; An array indexed by column. String cells are represented as an array of runs, each with a text value and a font array (holding name, size, bold, italic, underline, strike and color) or &null; when the run carries no formatting; non-string cells pass through their plain typed value. Returns &null; when no worksheet is open for reading or there are no more rows.
